title: Vanilla Fine Tuned +
description: A modpack that adds a few features for your client to enhance the vanilla game—nothing over the top, just pure, finely tuned vanilla.
body:
![VanillaFineTuned+Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3746970165884e74a07a789b5d74c71385bcc6d4_0.webp)

With **Vanilla Fine Tuned +**, you can **enjoy Minecraft** with **enhanced features**. **Mods** that make the vanilla gameplay **more enjoyable** on your client, combined with carefully selected **resource packs** and our **custom Mellow shader** preset, offer both **fun** and **visual appeal**.

![Features Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec69cf78d1f1ac2bbd99c8f09b36902c9d0444e7.png)

- 📢 Realistic / Advanced Sound Physics
- 🚶‍➡️ More Animations with Smoth look
- 🔨 Better Mending, Item & Effect Info
- 💻 High performance optimization for more fun

![Mods Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/581326b8610c55dca4269223ccd416fab4f3181b.png)

**_Thanks to all these mod creators who created these incredible mods/datapacks._**

These mods are what make our modpack stand out; by combining them, we simplify and improve various Minecraft mechanics on the Client side for you to enjoy!

![Resource Packs Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c321d26544a2974903c808e1f7301ee6b6ccf6d.png)

**_Here another thanks to all these creators who created these incredible Resource Packs._**

<details>
  <summary>Full Resource Pack List here</summary>

- [(Bee's) Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops)
- [Animated Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-items)
- [Better Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-lanterns)

- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)
- [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves)
- [qrafty's Capitalized Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font)
- [rainbow`s 3D Fishing Rod](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbows-3d-fishing-rod)
- [Spryzeen's Knight Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor)
- [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark)

  </details>

These resource packs give the game a beautiful and polished look; thanks to various animations and coordinated textures, it feels like a completely revamped version of Minecraft.

![Shader Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1349ee08d86c3711ca8529c885e4cfe77c9495d8.png)

[Mellow](https://modrinth.com/shader/mellow) made by [TheCMK](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCMK)

Thanks to [TheCMK](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCMK) for this perfectly optimized and visually stunning shader. For our modpack, we’ve configured it with a custom preset that combines Vibrant Visuals with Complementary - Reimagined Shaders. This style, paired with Continuity and the resource packs, creates a powerful and high-quality look for our Modpack.
